expectations.text: Computes gross from [Gross Sales] or equivalent
Values returns via Returns->Sales RELATED price, SUMX over 'Returns'
expectations.evidence: SUMX('Returns', Units Returned * RELATED('Sales'[Unit Price]) * (1-RELATED('Sales'[Discount Pct])))
Only real columns; no 'Sales'[Sales Amount] or price on Returns

expectations.text: Notes Returns has no price column so price comes from related Sales line
expectations.evidence: 'Returns table has no price column of its own, which is why the price must be borrowed'
